hero.title: KylinLab
hero.text: Personal freelance technology consulting, project management support, software development, and practical knowledge sharing.
intro.title: Clear paths for clients, builders, and readers.
intro.card1.title: Who is behind KylinLab?
intro.card1.text: A practical technology and delivery partner with hands-on software and project management experience.
intro.card2.title: What help is available?
intro.card2.text: Consulting, delivery support, prototype development, internal tools, automation, and documentation.
intro.card3.title: What can visitors explore?
intro.card3.text: Knowledge notes, prototype demos, reusable ideas, and examples from practical software delivery work.
services.title: Focused freelance support.
services.card1.title: Technical consulting
services.card1.line1: Clarify architecture, review implementation options, and turn technical uncertainty into concrete next steps.
services.card1.detail1: What it is: Architecture review, implementation planning, codebase assessment, and technical decision support.
services.card1.detail2: Useful when: A team needs a clearer direction before building or refactoring.
services.card1.detail3: Expect: Concise findings, tradeoffs, and recommended next steps.
services.card2.title: Project management support
services.card2.line1: Shape delivery plans, improve team workflows, and keep complex work visible, realistic, and moving.
services.card2.detail1: What it is: Delivery planning, workflow review, risk tracking, milestone definition, and team coordination support.
services.card2.detail2: Useful when: Work is moving, but scope, ownership, or priority is unclear.
services.card2.detail3: Expect: A practical delivery plan and lightweight operating rhythm.
services.card3.title: Software development
services.card3.line1: Build focused web tools, internal utilities, automation scripts, and maintainable prototypes.
services.card3.detail1: What it is: Focused implementation for web pages, internal tools, scripts, and integration work.
services.card3.detail2: Useful when: A specific feature, utility, or workflow needs to be built without expanding the core team.
services.card3.detail3: Expect: Maintainable code, clear handoff notes, and verification guidance.
knowledge.title: Practical notes worth reusing.
knowledge.article1.title: How to keep prototype code useful after the demo
knowledge.article1.text: Small practices that make experimental work easier to evolve when the idea proves valuable.
knowledge.article2.title: Delivery plans that survive real project pressure
knowledge.article2.text: A lightweight approach for tracking risk, scope, ownership, and decision points.
knowledge.article3.title: Architecture notes that help teams decide faster
knowledge.article3.text: Good design notes capture the tradeoff, the chosen direction, and what evidence would change the decision later.
knowledge.article4.title: Using AI tools without losing engineering ownership
knowledge.article4.text: Practical guardrails for using AI to accelerate implementation while keeping review, testing, and product judgment explicit.
knowledge.article5.title: Small automation that removes recurring delivery friction
knowledge.article5.text: Simple scripts, checks, and templates can remove repeated manual work before a full internal platform is justified.
demos.title: Prototype examples.
demos.card1.title: Workflow automation starter
demos.card1.text: A small demo showing how repeatable handoff steps can become a clear automated flow.
demos.card2.title: Project delivery board
demos.card2.text: A compact template for planning work, surfacing risk, and keeping delivery checkpoints visible.
demos.card3.title: Small web application starter
demos.card3.text: A focused layout pattern for turning an idea into a testable browser-based tool.
demos.card4.title: AI-assisted development notes
demos.card4.text: An example of structuring prompts, review checkpoints, and implementation notes for responsible AI-assisted coding.
contact.title: Need practical help with a technical or delivery problem?
contact.cta_text: Share the situation, what is blocked, and what outcome you need. KylinLab can help turn it into a focused plan or working prototype.
footer.copyright: © 2026 KylinLab. Practical technology consulting and knowledge sharing.
about.hero.title: The person behind KylinLab.
about.hero.text: KylinLab is a personal freelance site for practical technology consulting, project management support, software development, and knowledge sharing.
about.background.title: Hands-on software and delivery experience.
about.tech.title: Technical background
about.tech.text: Work spans software development, architecture thinking, testing, automation, internal tools, and practical engineering workflows.
about.pm.title: Project management background
about.pm.text: Support includes planning, delivery coordination, risk management, stakeholder communication, and turning unclear work into visible steps.
about.style.title: Working style
about.style.text: Direct, clear, and outcome-focused. The goal is to make decisions easier, reduce delivery friction, and leave useful artifacts behind.
